subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Quds 3
subcodes.first_line: This is the Tablet of holiness; it hath been sent down, through the power of truth, by Him Who is the Almighty, the All-Wise
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح القدس قد نزل بالحق من لدن عزیز حکیم یستنشق منه الموحدون رایحه الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @nearness and remoteness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
